name: COMFEE Single-Function Microwave 650W
pros: Extremely affordable at ¥6,980 for a functional microwave
Simple dial controls require no language proficiency
Reliable 650W power suitable for basic heating and defrosting
cons: No advanced features like inverter technology or sensor cooking
Limited review base (only 16 reviews) suggests lower market confidence
shortDescription: No-frills microwave with dial controls and strong value for budget-conscious renters.
review: COMFEE's entry-level microwave delivers exactly what it promises: basic reheating and defrosting without paying for features you won't use. The mechanical dial is refreshingly foreigner-friendly since no menu navigation is needed. At this price point, it's hard to complain, though build quality feels plasticky and there's no sensor technology to prevent overcooking.
